'''pachoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaetosomatid|chaetosomatid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaetosomatid|chaetosomatid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pachoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæchereth|pæchereth]] || [[word:pæcherej|pæcherej]] || [[word:pæcheresh|pæcheresh]] || [[word:pæchere|pæchere]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pachochoroth|pachochoroth]] || [[word:pachochoroj|pachochoroj]] || [[word:pachochorosh|pachochorosh]] || [[word:pachochoro|pachochoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pachoroth|pachoroth]] || [[word:pachoroj|pachoroj]] || [[word:pachorosh|pachorosh]] || [[word:pachoro|pachoro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pachofroth|pachofroth]] || [[word:pachofroj|pachofroj]] || [[word:pachofrosh|pachofrosh]] || [[word:pachofrof|pachofrof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pachorotho|pachorotho]] || [[word:pachorojo|pachorojo]] || [[word:pachorosho|pachorosho]] || [[word:pachoroko|pachoroko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pachoroth|pachoroth]] || [[word:pachoroj|pachoroj]] || [[word:pachorosh|pachorosh]] || [[word:pachoro|pachoro]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pachorothol|pachorothol]] || [[word:pachorojol|pachorojol]] || [[word:pachoroshol|pachoroshol]] || [[word:pachorokol|pachorokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pachorothotho|pachorothotho]] || [[word:pachorojojo|pachorojojo]] || [[word:pachoroshosho|pachoroshosho]] || [[word:pachoroko|pachoroko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pachorothon|pachorothon]] || [[word:pachorojon|pachorojon]] || [[word:pachoroshon|pachoroshon]] || [[word:pachorokon|pachorokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pachorothoro|pachorothoro]] || [[word:pachorojoro|pachorojoro]] || [[word:pachoroshoro|pachoroshoro]] || [[word:pachorokoro|pachorokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
